rationale: The two notes indicate a strong conceptual overlap: the cited 2010 paper explicitly models satisfaction level and heterogeneity (mean-variance) and their joint effects on shareholder value/volatility, while the citing 2013 paper studies brand rating mean and dispersion and their interaction effects on abnormal returns and idiosyncratic risk. This looks like a plausible foundational/mechanism source rather than an incidental mention, so it merits full second-stage relation judgment.
